Join the goblins when the discipline splits — real demolition is signed for in Gadgetzan, warranty void.
name: Pyromancer
restoreCry: Ignition. The experiment resumes.

suggested.name: Mantle of Doan
suggested.note: Arcanist Doan, Scarlet Monastery — the book-burner's mantle, worn by a better reader

suggested.name: Searing Needle
suggested.note: The Anvilrage garrison, Blackrock Depths — a lancet that teaches the wound to welcome fire

suggested.name: Burst of Knowledge
suggested.note: Ambassador Flamelash, Blackrock Depths — ten seconds of free casting, taken at the bottom of the fire

suggested.name: Drakefire Amulet
suggested.note: General Drakkisath's blood, worn at the throat — the key that opens Onyxia's lair

suggested.name: Mana Igniting Cord
suggested.note: Molten Core — the belt every fire mage of the era tied on first

suggested.name: Choker of the Fire Lord
suggested.note: Molten Core — the Firelord's own circle of office

suggested.name: Talisman of Ephemeral Power
suggested.note: Molten Core — fifteen seconds in which the whole world is kindling

trials.epitaph: The thaw was measured: %d creatures of frost and cold, given to the fire.
trials.name: The War on Winter
trials.objective: Burn down the creatures of frost and cold — wendigo, Frostmane, Chillwind and their frozen kin — wherever winter walks
trials.text: You were born in a snowfield and you have hated it ever since. Cold is the universe winning; fire is somebody doing something about it. Every frozen thing you put down is one degree taken back. The thaw is measured in bodies. Keep the tally.

trials.name: First Kindling
trials.objective: Slay 10 wendigo in the Grizzled Den of Coldridge Valley
trials.text: Your first spell was Fireball. It is the only first spell. In the den west of Anvilmar the wendigo sleep packed in their own frost — white fur, cold blood, ten of them. Light the stove and begin the war.

trials.name: The First Device
trials.objective: Assemble a Rough Copper Bomb in Tinker Town, Ironforge
trials.text: Magic is half your craft; the half that ticks is learned in Tinker Town. Beg a bench near Springspindle's, bolt your first bomb together, and understand what the trainers will never say aloud: a fireball you can hand to a friend is still a fireball.

trials.name: The Oath at the Great Forge
trials.objective: /kneel before the Great Forge of Ironforge
trials.text: Other orders kneel to thrones. Yours kneels to the largest honest fire in the world — the Great Forge, which has not gone out since Ironforge was carved. Swear the only oath that matters there: no frost, no half-measures, and the work never cools.

trials.name: Melt the Hold
trials.objective: Slay 15 Frostmane trolls in Dun Morogh
trials.text: The Frostmane named themselves after the enemy. That is either a confession or a dare, and you should treat it as both. Fifteen of them, anywhere the snow hides them — the hills above Coldridge, Frostmane Hold, the valley shrines. Winter recruits; so does the fire.

trials.name: Trial of the Ignition
trials.objective: Land 25 critical strikes
trials.text: Any apprentice can make fire touch a thing. The art is making it catch — the crit that ignites, the burn that outlives the bolt. Twenty-five perfect strikes. The difference between heat and fire is follow-through.

trials.completionNote: The ejection seat worked. Nothing else did. Note both.
trials.name: Bad Engineering
trials.objective: Slay Sneed in the Deadmines, vows clean
trials.text: In the Deadmines a goblin lumbermaster named Sneed drives a shredder through what used to be honest tunnels — Venture-grade engineering, leased to thieves, maintained by nobody. Walk in with your vows clean and put bad engineering out of its misery. Inspect the wreck after. There will be a lesson in it.

trials.name: The Falling Star
trials.objective: Cast your first Pyroblast
trials.text: Six seconds is a long time to stand still in a fight, and the trainers will tell you it is wasted. Let them. At the end of those six seconds an immense fiery boulder falls out of the sky onto a specific person, and from that day forward you are not a mage who uses fire. You are a Pyromancer.

trials.name: Trial of the Stagger
trials.objective: Stun 50 foes with the Impact of your fire
trials.text: Trained right, fire does not only burn — it staggers. The blast wave arrives before the pain does, and for two heartbeats the subject simply stops. Fifty foes halted mid-stride by their own ignition. The cold school freezes feet; yours convinces them.

trials.name: Trial of the Firestorm
trials.objective: Catch 3 or more foes in a single Flamestrike, 10 times
trials.text: A pillar of fire is a terrible thing to waste on one person. Gather them first — let them commit, let them bunch — then bring the sky down on the appointment you made. Three at a time, ten times over. Crowd control is just crowd allocation.

trials.name: Warranty Void
trials.objective: Sign with the goblins in Gadgetzan and assemble a Goblin Sapper Charge
trials.text: At two hundred skill the discipline splits, and the choice is no choice at all: the gnomes of your own blood build target dummies and shrink rays; Nixx Sprocketspring in Gadgetzan builds things that go off. Sign his pledge of secrecy, show your work, and bolt together the sapper charge — the only spell in your book that hurts you for casting it. Respect it accordingly.

trials.name: Faster Than the Fuse
trials.objective: Build and wear Goblin Rocket Boots
trials.text: Sooner or later you will cut a fuse too short, and on that day you will want to be wearing the answer. Black mageweave, mithril tubing, goblin rocket fuel — boots that outrun your own arithmetic. They are prone to explode. So is everything you love.

trials.completionNote: His Detonation was adequate. His filing system was not.
trials.name: The Book Burner
trials.objective: Slay Arcanist Doan in the Scarlet Monastery's library, vows clean
trials.text: In the Monastery's library sits Arcanist Doan, keeper of more learning than the Crusade deserves, who detonates the room when cornered and burns the books that frighten him. Fire in the hands of fear — there is no worse chemistry. Walk in with your vows clean and grade his thesis.

trials.name: Eyes for the Work
trials.objective: Build and wear Fire Goggles
trials.text: You are going where the air itself glows, and you will want to watch it without blinking. Grind the lenses yourself — an engineer trusts no optics she didn't torque. Seventeen points of the world's heat, filed under acceptable.

trials.name: The Dragon's Sneeze
trials.objective: Assemble a Goblin Dragon Gun
trials.text: Mithril tubes, truesilver, four cans of rocket fuel, and the goblins' finest idea: a personal flamethrower. The schematic's own footnote says it all — it works, unless it explodes. Build it anyway. A Pyromancer who won't carry fire on her back is a tourist.

trials.name: The Living Volcano
trials.objective: Stand atop Fire Plume Ridge in Un'Goro Crater
trials.text: In the middle of the world's greenest crater there is a mountain that never stopped burning. Climb Fire Plume Ridge and stand where the rock runs liquid. This is what you are apprenticed to — not the candle, not the forge. This.

trials.name: The Gatekeeper
trials.objective: Slay Overmaster Pyron at the quarry gate of Blackrock Mountain
trials.text: At the quarry door into Blackrock Mountain stands Overmaster Pyron, a pillar of flame that drives slaves for the Dark Irons. Fire that bullies is fire wasted — and Jalinda Sprig at Morgan's Vigil is paying gnomes to say so. Snuff him and walk in over the embers.

trials.name: Bottled Fire
trials.objective: Take 5 Essences of Fire from the burning things of the world
trials.text: When something made of fire dies, a little of the fire refuses to. The greater elementals of the Gorge and the Crater carry it; cut it free and bottle it. Five essences, warm through the glass. Reagents for the work ahead — and proof that fire, handled right, keeps.

trials.name: Rite of the Living Flame
trials.objective: Slay an elite enemy while your Combustion burns
trials.text: There is a state past casting fire, where every spell that leaves you arrives critical — the fire feeding the fire feeding the fire. The old hands call it combustion and spend it carefully. Kindle it, pick something elite, and finish the argument before the state fades.

trials.name: The Title Dispute
trials.objective: Slay Pyromancer Loregrain in Blackrock Depths
trials.text: Somewhere in the Depths a Dark Iron keeps the title Pyromancer, tending Ragnaros's altars with borrowed fire and a stolen word. He shows himself rarely — wait at his cold shrine as long as it takes. There is one Pyromancer under this mountain, and you are going down there to make it true.

trials.name: Winter's Teeth
trials.objective: Slay 25 Chillwind beasts in Winterspring
trials.text: Winterspring is the war on winter's home front: a land that froze and called it peace, patrolled by chimaera whose very breath is the enemy. Twenty-five of the Chillwind put down in their own snow. Fight where the cold is strongest, or admit you only ever burned the easy things.

trials.completionNote: Negotiations concluded. Fire is not for sale.
trials.name: The Ambassador
trials.objective: Slay Ambassador Flamelash in Blackrock Depths, vows clean
trials.text: Deep in Shadowforge City burns the envoy of the Firelands himself — Ambassador Flamelash, who brokers the Dark Irons' servitude and calls it diplomacy. Fire signs no treaties and keeps no slaves. Walk into the embassy with your vows clean and recall him, permanently.

trials.name: The Master's Familiar
trials.objective: Build an Arcanite Dragonling
trials.text: Three hundred skill, a mechanical dragonling rebuilt in arcanite, and a furnace where its heart should be. Wizards summon familiars; engineers build better ones. When it leaves your hands breathing fire, you have nothing left to prove at the bench.

trials.name: The Living Bomb
trials.objective: Slay Baron Geddon in the Molten Core
trials.text: Baron Geddon's signature is a thing of terrible beauty: he makes a person the bomb and lets the timer do the cruelty. It is your own doctrine, written by something with no bench and no restraint. Study it from inside the blast radius — then retire the author.

trials.name: A Fire Gone Wrong
trials.objective: Claim the Staff of the Shadow Flame from Nefarian
trials.text: Atop Blackwing Lair, Nefarian breeds fire crossed with shadow — flame taught to hate, the one experiment your school forbids. His staff is the proof and the prize. Take it, carry it, and let it remind you daily what the work becomes in the wrong hands.

trials.name: The Crown of Fire
trials.objective: Slay Ragnaros in the Molten Core
trials.text: There is one title above Pyromancer, and it is occupied. Ragnaros sits at the bottom of the world wearing all the fire there is, and he uses it the way winter uses ice — to make everything still. Go down with your bombs and your one school and file the universe's boldest claim. The crown of fire fits a gnome.

trials.name: Winter, Conceded
trials.objective: /dance in the Frostfire Hot Springs of Winterspring
trials.text: In the coldest land on the continent there is water that never freezes, because the fire under the world keeps it warm. Go to the Frostfire Hot Springs, wade in, and dance — for the war, the tally, and every spark that caught. Winter sends its regards. Decline them.

breakCry: Catastrophic malfunction! A Tinker without gadgets is just short.
fantasy: A gnomish genius who solves every problem with a bigger gadget. The gun is self-built, the bombs are homemade, and the warranty is void.
honorRules: Keep a gun on your back — preferably one you built yourself.
Use an engineering gadget (bomb, dynamite, trinket) in every hard fight.
Craft your own gear when Engineering allows it.
name: Tinker
restoreCry: All systems nominal. For Gnomeregan!
